title: Infosys Science Foundation Announces Infosys Prize 2025 Laureates
detailed_summary: Infosys Science Foundation announced the Infosys Prize 2025 laureates across six research categories. The award recognizes scholars in Economics, Engineering and Computer Science, Humanities and Social Sciences, Life Sciences, Mathematical Sciences, and Physical Sciences. Each category prize comprises a gold medal, citation, and prize purse of USD 100,000 or its equivalent in INR.

key_facts.fact: The Infosys Science Foundation announced the winners of the Infosys Prize 2025 in six categories: Economics, Engineering and Computer Science, Humanities and Social Sciences, Life Sciences, Mathematical Sciences, and Physical Sciences.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Science Foundation Announces Infosys Prize 2025 Laureates

key_facts.fact: The prize for each category comprises a gold medal, a citation, and a prize purse of USD 100,000 (or its equivalent in INR).
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Science Foundation Announces Infosys Prize 2025 Laureates

key_facts.fact: From 2024, the prize has shifted focus to honor researchers under the age of 40.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Science Foundation Announces Infosys Prize 2025 Laureates
